name: Chickpea Spinach Surprise
recipeIngredient: 1 15 oz can chickpeas, drained and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the spinach according to package directions.
2. In a separate pan, sauté the onion, garlic, and seasonings in the lemon juice and water until fragrant.
3. Stir in the cooked spinach and chickpeas.
4. Serve.
